name: njust-ai-cj-workspace-schema
displayName: NJUST AI CJ workspace settings schema
description: Declares njust-ai-cj.* workspace keys so .vscode/settings.json validates without installing the full extension in this window.

njust-ai-cj.cloudAgent.deferredProtocol.description: Use deferred execution protocol (start → tool execution → resume loop).

njust-ai-cj.cloudAgent.compileLoop.enabl.description: Enable compile feedback loop after Cloud Agent writes code.
